creator: ports.maintainer@evilphi.com
text:
Updating mail/postfixadmin involves fixing the compatibility problem between Ports and Composer.  See ports/276555 for more information.  I never got feedback from the submitter of that PR about what they would like to see as a fix.

So I'll ask you the same question:

Would having mail/postfixadmin just be a metaport with instructions to clone postfixadmin from Github be a reasonable solution to you?
